1.2.0.en: Fixed dashboard capabilities not showing values: voltage, connector status, session energy, charger temperature, charging profile, Plug & Charge, smart charging active. Renamed 'Charger health' to 'Charger OK' for clarity. Added 'Fault description' capability showing fault details when a charger fault is active.
1.2.0.nl: Dashboard-capabilities tonen nu waarden: spanning, connectorstatus, sessie-energie, ladertemperatuur, laadprofiel, Plug & Charge, smart laden actief. 'Ladergezondheid' hernoemd naar 'Lader in orde' voor duidelijkheid. 'Storing omschrijving' capability toegevoegd die storingsdetails toont bij een actieve storing.

1.0.1.en: Lowered minimum compatibility to support more Homey firmware versions and improve local installation compatibility.
1.0.1.nl: Minimale compatibiliteit verlaagd om meer Homey-firmwareversies te ondersteunen en lokale installatiecompatibiliteit te verbeteren.

1.0.0.en: Initial release: Volt Time Cloud API integration with charger monitoring, start/stop charging, current limit control, Homey Energy support, and 17 flow cards.
1.0.0.nl: Eerste release: Volt Time Cloud API-integratie met ladermonitoring, starten/stoppen van laden, stroomlimiet-regeling, Homey Energy-ondersteuning en 17 flow-kaarten.

1.0.2.en: Bug fixes applied to API connectivity

1.1.1.en: Added device capabilities to device dashboard

1.2.1.en: Fixed the retrieval of some device capabilities values and changed device icon.svg

1.2.4.en: Updated the app tagline to Smart EV charging automation for your Volt Time charger. Simplified documentation by removing duplicated descriptions and Flow Card sections from README.md, README.txt, and README.nl.txt so they align with Homey App Store guidelines. Updated the driver icon to comply with Homey design requirements by using a 50×50 viewBox with a consistent stroke-width and a simplified EV charger outline.
